title: pteridium esculentum subsp. campestre
intro: Pteridium esculentum subsp. campestre, also known as the bracken fern or bracken, is a subspecies of the Pteridium esculentum plant, which belongs to the fern family (Pteridaceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Pteridium esculentum subsp. campestre include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve liver function, and prevent certain types of cancer. Pteridium esculentum subsp. campestre is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, although its use should be cautious due to potential toxicity and side effects.
